subject: english
learning_objectives: Distinguish spelling and meaning in homophone pairs

sections.heading: Definition
sections.content: Homophones are words that have the same sound but different spellings and meanings.

sections.heading: Examples
sections.content: Examples in the note include allowed/aloud, stake/steak, fare/fair, court/caught, right/write, toil/toy, key/quay, and thought/taught.
